dialogos.texto_en: Okaaay! I'm opening the door now!
Pardon us.
Come on in.\nMiku is already here.
Sorry for being late.
Did something happen?
I just took a long bath...
And, you got a little dizzy from thinking too much?
Yeah...
Are you okay?\nWould you like some water?
I'm fine.\nLet's continue our conversation.
...Got it.
Hmm...\nIt seems like Futaro-kun is having a harder time\nthan we thought.
Maybe we went a little too far\nin pushing him to his limits.
However, we can't go easy on Futaro.\nWe're testing his resolve.
If we went easy on him,\nit would be disrespectful to him.
That's true.\nHowever...Uesugi-san\nseemed a little confused earlier.
I had high expectations this morning,\nsince he was so confident.
Indeed, Fu-kun wasn't doing well today.\nBut it's too early to jump to conclusions.
The deadline is the evening after tomorrow.\nWe still have two days left.
Yes, we've only finished the first day.
In Futaro-kun's case, we never know what will happen\nuntil the last minute.
Two more days...
...Hey.\nI'm sure there's someone special\nin Uesugi-san's heart already.
That's possible.\nHe's usually a cautious person.
If not, he wouldn't have said anything\nabout giving us an answer.
...Thinking about that,\nwe were so harsh on Futaro.
That's because we meant it. Ichika said it too,\nbut we never know what will happen\nuntil the last minute, with him.
I think Fu-kun has already made up his mind.\nHe was so determined to tell us apart today.
Well, the quintuplets game was certainly unexpected.
If there's love, he can tell us apart.\nThat's why we can't go easy on him.
We wouldn't be happy with a confession\nthat was the result of someone slacking off.
Then, let's go all out from tomorrow on.\nIs everyone okay with that?
Of course.\nIt should be a good opportunity for him\nto have confidence in his feelings.
Otherwise, it would be impossible for him to confess\non the final day.
It's possible that his target is you, Itsuki.
...I understand that.
I said all that stuff to him.\nI should at least have my own resolve...
...Wow.
Wh-what's wrong?\nDid I say something strange?
No, it wasn't strange in the slightest.
It wasn't strange, indeed.
Itsuki, you...
What, Nino?
...No.\nActually, it's nothing.
Well, then it depends\non how hard Futaro-kun works from now on.
That's what it comes down to.
